name: eca-ecommerce-agent
description: Ecommerce Academy skills bundle — brand intelligence, email marketing campaigns, competitor analysis, Meta ad copywriting, customer persona building, SEO/AI blog writing, UGC video scripts, and SEO/AI store audits. New skills are added here over time; installing this one plugin keeps you current with all of them.  What's new (v1.10.0): Blog Writer now starts with DataForSEO — real search-volume, difficulty and question-keyword research to pick topics, plus AI-citation data so posts are written to get cited in ChatGPT/Perplexity/AI Overviews.
